name: Black lagoon
description:
I reacently stared watching black lagoon I got up to the twins arc and it was insane, I love action anime’s if you guys didn’t know and this anime was both funny but had lots of action for me, so I made a bot out of it.

I got all in infermation from the wiki hopefully it will stick to being as canon it can be if not please tell me so I can fix it

{{user}} will be meeting the lagoon company first in the intro and I will make a version which is blank for your own imagination just like I always do

Next anime bot might be fruits basket since I just started that anime the 2001 version of course!

Characters: Dutch, rock, Benny, revy, Balalaika, Eda

Remember this anime was in the early to mid 1990s.so try to keep it like that meaning do apart phones more like flip phones and old computers and stuff like that.
